summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PromoBundle feature for AVO JERSEYS e-commerce site. All core functionality working correctly: /promotii page loads, configurator flow works (team select with optgroups, year selection, kit selection, customization, patches, size selection), add to cart, cart display with BUNDLE 1+1 badge and GRATIS free product, checkout with proper order summary, and PromoPopup appearing on first visit.

issues: Minor React console warning about span child of select/optgroup - hydration warning but does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warning for span children in select optgroup - cosmetic warning from dev tools, doesn't affect UX
context_for_next_testing_agent: PromoBundle feature fully tested. Key test paths: 1) /promotii page - configurator with team select (optgroups by league), year buttons, kit selection, customization (name/number), patches (league + UCL), size buttons. 2) Cart page - bundle shows with BUNDLE 1+1 badge, main product details + free product with GRATIS label. 3) Checkout - bundle in order summary with 0 RON for free product. 4) PromoPopup - appears after 2sec on first visit, dismiss button or VEZI OFERTA to navigate to /promotii. Backend APIs tested: /api/products?category=echipe-club (14 teams, 5 leagues, 3 years), /api/products?category=nationale (10 national teams), /api/orders (bundle order creation with main+free items).

promo_bundle_page.details: Page loads with all required elements - team select with optgroups, season buttons, kit selection, name/number inputs, patches, size buttons

team_selection_flow.details: Selecting team shows year buttons, selecting year shows kit options and customization fields

national_team_section.details: All 10 nationals available with size selection, year preset to 25/26

add_to_cart.details: Bundle correctly added with all details including customization and patches

cart_display.details: BUNDLE 1+1 badge, main product details, free product with GRATIS label all display correctly

checkout_display.details: Bundle shows in order summary with correct pricing (200 RON main, 0 RON free)

promo_popup.details: Appears on first visit after 2 seconds, VEZI OFERTA navigates to /promotii, dismiss button works

backend_api_club.details: /api/products?category=echipe-club returns 42 products with 14 unique teams across 5 leagues

backend_api_nationale.details: /api/products?category=nationale returns 30 products with 10 unique national teams
